traits.label: Zero-tolerance on labour / governance scandals
traits.detail: Founder and public face of a Swiss retail brand: reputational risk is financial risk. Will divest any consumer/retail holding hit with labour-exploitation allegations before the Swiss press can link it to his name.

evidence.quote: If my name is linked via my portfolio to an international corporate parent caught using sweatshops, illegal exploitation, or wage theft, it creates immediate hypocrisy risk for my own stores.
If any international consumer or retail brand we hold gets hit with severe labor exploitation allegations, dump the entire position before the local Swiss press can link my name to it.
if there is live media or judicial smoke surrounding their labor practices right now, the position must be flagged immediately before it hits mainstream national press.

traits.label: Accepts lower returns for a clean footprint
traits.detail: Analytical; will trade Sharpe ratio and yield for zero reputational liability in the portfolio.

evidence.quote: I will gladly accept a lower Sharpe ratio or lower yields in exchange for a clean portfolio footprint.
